_comment: Tier-2 cheap fixture for dg_transport#5: AffineConstraints::distribute on a DG solution is a no-op. The catalog Signal explicitly mentions both branches (no-op via empty AffineConstraints, OR ExcMessage). In deal.II 9.1.1 the no-op branch is taken: DoFTools::make_hanging_node_constraints on a DG DoFHandler produces an AffineConstraints with n_constraints()==0 even when hanging nodes are present in the triangulation. Numerical comparison: assert n_constraints == 0 on a refined mesh.
